articles.title: SAAS PRICING IN THE AI ERA: SUBSCRIPTION OR USAGE?
articles.summary: Your finance team wants predictable, subscription-based revenue. Product and growth want usage-based upside. In the AI era, that tension is reshaping how companies price software. Metronome's new guide to hybrid pricing models [4] breaks down how companies like Anthropic, Cursor, and GitHub bridge both worlds. You'll learn:

articles.title: SCARY TIMES: HOW TO LEAD THROUGH LAYOFF FEAR
articles.summary: Product leaders are now expected to guide teams through not just layoffs, but the constant fear of them. Honest communication, focusing on controllable actions, and coaching teams toward meaningful impact - not survival - can preserve trust and resilience when stability disappears.

articles.title: THE BROWSER BECOMES AN AGENT
articles.summary: Browsers are evolving from passive tools into intelligent agent platforms that understand, reason, and act for users. This shift transforms browsing into proactive collaboration, redefining how humans and AI interact online.

articles.title: 8 HABITS OF HIGHLY EFFECTIVE PRODUCT LEADERS
articles.summary: Effective product leadership centers on empowering teams, fostering clarity, and leading by example. Great leaders stay close to the work, coach over command, adapt their style, and prioritize people above process.

articles.title: 13 PRODUCT-BUILDING LESSONS FROM PALANTIR
articles.summary: High-impact products come from trusted product-engineering partnerships grounded in accountability, field immersion, and shared ownership. Prioritize strengths, build feedback-rich, empathetic cultures, and design for scalability and speed without sacrificing trust.

articles.title: PAYMENTS EXPERIENCES THAT WORK OR _AND _THAT INSPIRE
articles.summary: Don't compromise on your vision for the reliable experience your customers deserve. Get the best of both worlds with Marqeta [9]: a payments provider who can keep pace with your own innovation and that's trusted by some of the biggest brands in the world. See what's

articles.title: BEYOND FRAMEWORKS: SIX YEARS OF TESTING BUSINESS IDEAS WITH DAVID J. BLAND
articles.summary: AI has made experimentation faster, shifting success from process perfection to adaptability. Progress now depends on mindset, systems, and the courage to act on real learning, not endless testing.

articles.title: TRAFFIC IS NO LONGER A RELIABLE GROWTH METRIC
articles.summary: AI search is changing how people find products, making traffic an unreliable success metric. Webflow proves that tuning content for large language models and focusing on visibility, comprehension, and conversion can yield faster, higher-quality growth than old SEO tactics.

articles.title: PIVOTS, PATHS, AND PROTOTYPES
articles.summary: Embracing change can reveal truer paths than persistence ever could. Letting go of what no longer fits allows growth, experimentation, and authentic direction to emerge through courage and self-awareness.

articles.title: AI PROTOTYPING IS REDEFINING THE SPEED AND QUALITY OF PRODUCT IDEATION
articles.summary: AI is transforming product management by enabling teams to prototype and share ideas up to 10x faster. It shortens feedback loops and enhances designs using insights from thousands of proven UX patterns.

articles.title: LABOUR COSTS ARE A DISTRACTION IN PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT
articles.summary: Speedy responses and efficient collaboration matter more than counting participants or expenses.

articles.title: LETTING GO IS A LEADERSHIP SUPERPOWER
articles.summary: Letting go of past successes enables growth, resilience, and the creative capacity to navigate constant change.
